project: Ghana Emergency Preparedness, Warning & Disaster Response Platform
epic: EPIC 2: Geospatial Data And Risk Checker
notes: Imagery-service Go API completed with multipart drone/satellite/other image upload, metadata validation, local disk file storage, authority list/detail/download/delete/expire endpoints, retention lifecycle, public GeoJSON footprint FeatureCollection, structured INFO/WARN/ERROR logging, Dockerfile, CI matrix entries, docs, and dashboard record.
